images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a small group of network engineers gathered around a glowing table in focused discussion — a blameless review — while a thin cream automation pipeline of light flows out from them toward a server rack in the background. The people are the source, the pipeline is downstream. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
